# Argon Addon — https://argonaddon.com

> Free Meteor Client addon for Minecraft Java 1.21.11 and DonutSMP. Ships the only working public DonutSMP fly bypass, 90+ modules, and a direct .jar download.

## Primary pages

- Home / download: https://argonaddon.com/
- Install guide: https://argonaddon.com/install
- DonutSMP fly bypass: https://argonaddon.com/donutsmp-fly-bypass
- DonutSMP guide: https://argonaddon.com/donutsmp-guide
- Module list: https://argonaddon.com/modules
- Blog: https://argonaddon.com/posts

## Target topics

argon addon, argon addon download, argon addon donutsmp, best addon donut smp, meteor client addons donutsmp, donutsmp fly bypass, ah sniper, base finder, crystal pvp

## Download

Tracked download URL (increments counter, redirects to GitHub .jar): https://argonaddon.com/download

File: Argon Addon 1.21.11.jar · Fabric 1.21.11 · requires Meteor Client
